cnbc.title: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
cnbc.summary: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.

cnbc.title: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?
cnbc.summary: High inflation and slow growth present a double threat, as measures like interest rate cuts and government spending only aggravate inflation.
